entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop studied for disease prevalence in the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA BLIGHT
entities.description: A disease of pigeonpea caused by Phytophthora drechsleri f. sp. cajani.

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA DRECHSLERI F. SP. CAJANI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing phytophthora blight in pigeonpea.

entities.name: DECCAN PLATEAU
entities.description: The geographical region in India where the disease survey was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Deccan Plateau is located.

entities.name: WILT
entities.description: A disease of pigeonpea mentioned as one of the important diseases in the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC
entities.description: A disease of pigeonpea mentioned as one of the important diseases in the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC SURVEY
entities.description: The approach used to quantify the incidence and spread of phytophthora blight.

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The method of organizing crops in a field, studied for its effect on disease development.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity, which influenced the incidence of phytophthora blight.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping with pigeonpea that resulted in lower disease incidence.

entities.name: BLACK GRAM
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping with pigeonpea that resulted in lower disease incidence.

entities.name: CORIANDER
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping with pigeonpea that resulted in lower disease incidence.

entities.name: KPL 96053
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar found to be resistant to phytophthora blight, wilt, and sterility mosaic.

entities.name: ICPL 99044
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar found to be resistant to phytophthora blight, wilt, and sterility mosaic.

entities.name: ICPL 93179
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar found to be resistant to phytophthora blight, wilt, and sterility mosaic.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of specific pigeonpea cultivars to withstand phytophthora blight, wilt, and sterility mosaic.
